Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
docs: add transaction pooling design for PgBouncer replacement

Design covers:
- Transaction mode \(strict, PgBouncer-compatible\)
- Hybrid mode \(smart pinning, default\)
- Transparent prepared statement re-preparation
- PgBouncer INI and env var compatibility
- Comprehensive test matrix for all edge cases
EOF
\)")
